nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 开阔山地
nodes.summary: 地形开阔且便于大翼展鸟类活动的山地区域。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: Kauaʻi ʻamakihi
nodes.summary: Kauaʻi ʻamakihi（Kauaʻi ʻamakihi，学名 Chlorodrepanis stejnegeri），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁、开阔山地、沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They previously occurred at lower elevations, but due to the loss of habitat, are now mostly found at elevations higher than 600 meters in mountainous areas. They are known to be around 'ōhi'a and koa trees. They are especially common in ōhi'a trees where they often nest and in ōhi'a forests. They can be spotted at Waimea Canyon, Nā Pali Plateau, Alaka'i Swamp, and Makaleha Mountains

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Kauaʻi ʻamakihi is threatened by habitat loss, invasive species, and diseases such as avian pox and avian malaria
